name: The World of Modern Karenerria
description:
It's modern furry time!

Alright, same world, but this time it's set in the modern era since there is a medieval one to be fair. (or well anywhere from 1900s to 2000s really). Again this is already an established world with it's own nations, so let me know if you just want an character that lets you create your own characters. Do let me know of any improvements here!

(PS: I already made a character like this, but it had 5k messages from me personally so, I didn't wanna feel like cheating or break any rules :P)
creator: Sepet
